## Parcels per household

```{r}
#| label: parcels per household table

parcels_per_hhold_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "parcels_per_hhold_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::parcels_per_hhold(
  parcel_df = parcels_per_hhold_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  use_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$parcels_per_hhold_use),
  use_vals = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$parcels_per_hhold_use_val[[1]]),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)

```
